steps.title: Trace the passage movement
steps.content: The text starts broadly with scientific interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects. It then narrows to Kepler and colleagues' study of wooden shipwrecks in the Gulf of Mexico. Finally, it reports a finding about microbial diversity and richness peaking around 125 meters from the wrecks.

steps.title: Match the three-part structure
steps.content: Choice B invents historical significance. Choice C treats wood type as the focus rather than study method. Choice D invents scholarly attention and a team reaction. The choice that follows general interest, specific study, then study finding matches the passage. The answer is A.
